title: T-017 — UI: OEE-001a/b/c A/P/Q Drilldown shared OeeFactorDrillPage (oee_availability/performance/quality_drilldown_page, 15-OEE-d)
prompt:
# T-017 — A/P/Q Drilldown pages (shared component)

PRD: docs/prd/15-OEE-PRD.md §15.3 OEE-001a/b/c, §15.7 + UX prototypes/design/15-OEE-UX.md cross-links lines 1025, 1054
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototypes: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/screens.jsx:471-543 (oee_availability_drilldown_page), :546-598 (oee_performance_drilldown_page), :600-655 (oee_quality_drilldown_page)

## Goal
Three RSC pages (`/oee/availability`, `/oee/performance`, `/oee/quality`) implemented via a single shared `<OeeFactorDrillPage>` layout component parameterised by `factor: 'A'|'P'|'Q'` per translation note. Each renders: factory factor% header card + per-line table with sparklines + factor-only loss categories table (filtered impact_dimension=A/P/Q from big_loss_categories T-005) + 7-day multi-line trend chart.

## Implementation contract
1. Shared `apps/web/app/(oee)/_components/oee-factor-drill-page.tsx`: props `{ factor: 'A'|'P'|'Q', date: string, data: FactorDrillData }`; renders the layout shared across A/P/Q.
2. Three RSC pages: `apps/web/app/(oee)/availability/page.tsx`, `apps/web/app/(oee)/performance/page.tsx`, `apps/web/app/(oee)/quality/page.tsx` — each calls a small server-side loader (lightweight: reads oee_daily_summary + 7-day per-line sparkline data + big_loss_categories filtered by impact_dimension); passes `factor` prop and data to the shared component.
3. Each page sources its target threshold from oee_alert_thresholds.{availability_min_pct, performance_min_pct, quality_min_pct} per line, fall back to tenant default.
4. Quality page (T-017c) additionally renders an Alert with cross-link to 09-QUALITY holds when 09-QUALITY module is available (env flag `quality.module_enabled`); silent when off (per translation note).
5. RTL test snapshot + parity checklist per page against its prototype line range.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(oee)/_components/oee-factor-drill-page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/availability/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/performance/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/quality/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/_components/__tests__/oee-factor-drill-page.test.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the production /oee/availability page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/screens.jsx:471-543 (oee_availability_drilldown_page), then it has the factory A% header + per-line table with sparklines + A-only loss categories + 7-day trend chart — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist; given /oee/performance compared to lines 546-598 and /oee/quality compared to lines 600-655, parity holds with `factor` swapped.
2. Given `<OeeFactorDrillPage>` is imported with prop `factor='P'`, when rendered, then the per-line table column reads 'Performance %' and the loss categories table filters big_loss_categories WHERE impact_dimension='P'.
3. Given the Quality page is loaded with quality.module_enabled=true, when rendered, then an Alert cross-link `Open in 09-QUALITY holds` is present; when the flag is false, the Alert is absent.
4. Given the task is closed out, when reviewers inspect evidence, then UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact + Playwright trace for all three pages per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; shared component reuse is documented (single <OeeFactorDrillPage> imported by 3 pages, no duplicated layout JSX).

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL test asserting parity per page + shared component reuse + factor-conditional rendering.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run app/(oee)/_components/oee-factor-drill-page && pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run app/(oee)/availability`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not duplicate layout JSX across A/P/Q pages — single shared <OeeFactorDrillPage> per translation note (BL-OEE-09).
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not hardcode loss category list — read from big_loss_categories (T-005) filtered by impact_dimension.
- Do not couple to 13-MAINTENANCE Equipment Health page (P2 cross-module dependency; gated by feature flag).
- Do not show 09-QUALITY cross-link when quality.module_enabled is false — silent fallback.

pipeline_inputs.description: Shared <OeeFactorDrillPage> component + 3 RSC pages /oee/{availability,performance,quality} parameterised by factor matching A/P/Q drill-down prototypes 1:1.

Additional acceptance detail: UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact + Playwright trace for all three pages per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.
